calendar.matters:
Application To Recall Sanctions And Restore Case To Active Status Declaration Of Kevin C. Mcdonough
Off Calendar Nov-20-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Application to recal Sanctions and restore case to active status is ordered off calendar. Failure to comply with CCP Section 1005. Furthermore this case was dismissed pursuant to the mandatory dismissal statute for failure to perfect service within 3 years. pursuant to CCP Section 583.250 amd CCP Section 583.210. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There was no appearance. The case was dismissed on the court's own motion pursuant to CCP 583.250 for non-compliance with CCP 583.210. Proceedings reported by Lesley Schneider. (212)
